parameters.query:
SELECT 
  el.lead_id,
  cl.user_id,
  cl.company_name,
  cl.email,
  el.company_linkedin_url,
  el.linkedin_should_use,
  el.linkedin_connection_note,
  el.linkedin_first_message,
  el.linkedin_approach,
  el.personalization_hook,
  el.lead_score,
  el.priority,
  el.products_services,
  el.decision_maker_access
FROM enriched_leads el
JOIN cleaned_leads cl ON el.lead_id = cl.id
WHERE el.enrichment_stage = 3
AND el.linkedin_should_use = TRUE
AND el.company_linkedin_url IS NOT NULL
AND el.linkedin_status IS NULL
ORDER BY el.lead_score DESC
LIMIT 5

INSERT INTO linkedin_outreach_queue (
  lead_id,
  user_id,
  company_name,
  linkedin_url,
  connection_note,
  followup_message,
  approach,
  priority,
  lead_score,
  status
) VALUES (
  {{ $json.lead_id }},
  {{ $json.user_id }},
  '{{ $json.company_name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.linkedin_url }}',
  '{{ $json.connection_note.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.followup_message.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.approach }}',
  '{{ $json.priority }}',
  {{ $json.lead_score }},
  'pending'
)

UPDATE enriched_leads
SET 
  linkedin_status = 'ready',
  linkedin_prepared_at = NOW()
WHERE lead_id = {{ $('Format LinkedIn Actions').item.json.lead_id }}

UPDATE enriched_leads
SET 
  linkedin_status = 'needs_review',
  linkedin_prepared_at = NOW()
WHERE lead_id = {{ $('Format LinkedIn Action Items').item.json.lead_id }}

parameters.jsCode:
return [{
  json: {
    lead_id: 1,
    user_id: 1,
    company_name: "Blue Bottle Coffee",
    email: "test@bluebottle.com",
    company_linkedin_url: "https://www.linkedin.com/company/blue-bottle-coffee",
    linkedin_should_use: true,
    linkedin_connection_note: "Hi! Saw Blue Bottle expanding in Oakland - love your specialty roasting approach. Would be great to connect!",
    linkedin_first_message: "Thanks for connecting! I'm impressed by Blue Bottle's commitment to quality. Given your expansion plans, I thought you might be interested in how we help specialty roasters optimize supply chains.",
    linkedin_approach: "connection_request",
    personalization_hook: "Premium specialty roaster with 523 reviews",
    lead_score: 87,
    priority: "hot",
    products_services: "Specialty coffee roasting",
    decision_maker_access: "Regional Manager"
  }
}];
